landing.heroSubtitle: Analyze mouth posture, stress patterns, and pitch contours with instant acoustic feedback. Speak fluently and confidently.
landing.feature1Desc: Micro-level analysis comparing your spoken waveform against native speaker acoustic benchmarks.
landing.feature2Desc: Engage in realistic conversational scenarios with an AI tutor that corrects accent and rhythm on the fly.
landing.feature3Desc: Visual guidance on tongue placement, lip rounding, and syllabic emphasis for tricky English phonemes.
landing.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about PronounceAI technology
landing.faq1Q: How does PronounceAI evaluate my speech accurately?
landing.faq1A: PronounceAI processes audio using specialized neural acoustic models. It decomposes your voice into individual phonemes and calculates formant alignment with native speaker benchmarks.
landing.faq2Q: Can I practice with American or British accents?
landing.faq2A: Yes! You can toggle seamlessly between General American (US) and Received Pronunciation (UK) accents across all tools.
landing.faq3A: Absolutely. Beginners receive foundational vowel and consonant drills with instant visual guidance to build confidence rapidly.
